testsuite.name: org.hyperledger.iroha.android.client.AndroidOkHttpClientRefactorTests
testsuite.system-err: 12月 30, 2025 8:28:53 午後 okhttp3.internal.platform.Platform log 警告: A connection to http://localhost:65020/ was leaked. Did you forget to close a response body? To see where this was allocated, set the OkHttpClient logger level to FINE: Logger.getLogger(OkHttpClient.class.getName()).setLevel(Level.FINE);
